description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds and runs unit tests for the fprime-tutorial-math-component repository. The workflow should trigger on push events to devel and release branches, and on pull requests to those branches, excluding certain paths. It should also cancel in-progress runs if a newer run is started on a given PR, unless the ref is devel or release. Use two reusable workflows: one to get the target branch and another to build the project and run unit tests.
